text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur gets injured during training, so I hastily
escort her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
For the love of... Ugh. It looks like regular
training's out of the question today.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to adjust my program. I've just gotta
narrow down the scope as much as possible...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, we're continuing training. Doing nothing
isn't zero—it's of negative value.
choice_data_list: Yeah, I still think we should take the day off.

Let's put our heads together and figure out
what we can do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I'm sorry, is even regular conversation too
difficult for you?
choice_data_list:
If anything happens to you, it'll be of even less
value. You'll wish you did nothing.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm just gonna collate data. You're not gonna
stop me from typing too, are you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna send you a list of things I need. Go get
them for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur says this irritably and starts hammering
at her keyboard.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm just gonna do some light exercise to keep my
muscles from atrophying. I don't need your
support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Saying that, Air Shakur begins a gym workout.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Change of plans. My body says to take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur cuts her training session short, looking
as if the pain has resurfaced.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whew... It looks like I can do this much at least.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Let's stay at this pace for now. And keep any
extraneous opinions to yourself, got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur keeps her training light and takes care
not to aggravate her injury.
